title: 17CM Self Watering Plant Pots – Brown Plastic Flower Pots with Drainage – Modern Matte Planters for Indoor & Outdoor Plants – Stylish Garden Pots – Decorative Plant Containers
features: ✔ Smart Self Watering System Alqua’s 17CM brown pots offer a built-in self-watering reservoir and drainage holes to maintain balanced moisture for healthy roots.
✔ Earthy Matte Brown Finish This rich brown planter features a matte surface and premium feel — adding warmth and elegance to both indoor and outdoor spaces.
✔ Durable All-Weather Plastic Made from strong, weather-resistant plastic for use throughout the year in gardens, balconies, or indoor settings.
✔ Ideal Size for Everyday Plants The 17CM diameter makes it perfect for herbs, succulents, foliage, or flowering plants in any environment.
✔ Elegant & Functional Design Combining natural tones with a minimalist form, this brown planter brings a refined, earthy touch to your home or garden.
description: Enhance your plant space with the Alqua 17CM Brown Self-Watering Plant Pot, where earthy tones meet smart design. This premium plastic planter features a rich matte brown finish, offering a natural look that fits both rustic and modern interiors. The self-watering system and efficient drainage help your plants thrive with minimal effort. Durable enough for outdoor use and stylish enough for your living room, it's ideal for those seeking brown plastic plant pots, self-watering planters, or neutral-tone containers that blend into any space.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎Drainage Hole, Durable, Lightweight, Portable, Self Watering
